nextWeekCalls: Stop reloading Close QA regression set every day. Narrow it, escalate it, or explicitly park it on Monday.
Clear cold follow-up risk early next week before it burns another close-of-day cycle.
Customer Pilot needs a decision before more work piles onto it: Decide whether to expand the pilot scope.
narrativeHints: There was real forward motion, but the same loose edges kept sneaking back into the close-of-day picture.
Finalize customer demo deck was one of the clearest movement threads across the week, so it is worth protecting instead of restarting from scratch.
Close QA regression set kept surviving the daily cut, which is usually a sign that the shape of the work is wrong, not just the timing.
Cold follow-up risk was not a one-day wobble. It kept showing back up in the stored closes.
caveats: 2 business days had no stored EOD review, so parts of the week were supplemented from raw data.

supportingSignals.summary: 3/5 expected stored EOD reviews were available for the week.
4 clear movement threads stood out across the week.
3 items kept slipping or staying unresolved.
